caption: A man wearing a grey t-shirt, a grey baseball cap with a red and white logo, and black over-ear headphones is seated in a recording studio. The background consists of dark grey acoustic foam panels. He is positioned in front of a large condenser microphone attached to a shock mount and boom arm, which has the text "Sennheiser Model MKH 416" printed on it. As the sequence progresses, the man shifts his body and gestures with his right arm. In the initial moments, his arm is extended forward as he moves his hand. He then settles back into his seat, his arm dropping and his upper body shifting slightly to the right. Throughout the sequence, he remains focused on the area in front of him, maintaining a consistent position relative to the microphone.
